meaning: n.整理成档案,文件归档,锉
examples: Manicurists are skilled at shaping and filing nails.
I discovered my husband rifling through the filing cabinet.
Along each wall stretched uniform green metal filing cabinets.
Levine the Court gave a bright green light to personal injury lawyers filing crippling lawsuits against pharmaceutical companies.
Ready for how simple filing a tax return under the Flat Tax Act is?
